mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_challenges (user_email, title, description, start_date, end_date, goal_days) VALUES (#{userEmail}, #{title}, #{description}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{goalDays})
mapper.select: SELECT challenge_id, user_email, title, description, start_date, end_date, goal_days, created_at FROM user_challenges WHERE user_email = #{userEmail} ORDER BY created_at DESC
